case_title: PETER TOUGHILL VS. A.W.CHESTERTON COMPANY et al

NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO SPECIALLY SET A TRIAL DATE CCP36(D), PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOUGHILL, PETER HEARING SET FOR JUN-01-2006 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 206
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT AMCORD, INC. SUED AS DOE 3 AND AS AMCORD, INC. DBA RIVERSIDE CEMENT COMPANY
ORDER GRANTING TRIAL PREFERENCE CCP 36(D)

ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-01-2006 IN 206, PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO SPECIALLY SET A TRIAL DATE PURSUANT TO CCP 36 (D) WAS GRANTED. PLAINTIFFS STATED THAT THE CASE WAS AT ISSUE. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 9/11/06 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 9/1/06 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS STIPULATED TO. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 7/14/06, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. ALL ECONOMIC EXPERT DISCOVERY IS TO BE COMPLETED 14 CALENDAR DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, INCLUDING DEPOSITION OF ECOMONIC EXPERT. THE PARED-DOWN LIST OF EXPERTS WILL BE FAXED NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL DATE. NO LATER THAN 12 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, EACH SIDE MAY IDENTIFY UP TO THREE EXPERT WITNESSES PERCEIVED TO BE NECESSARY TO BE DEPOSED FOR MEANINGFUL SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS TO OCCUR. THESE EXPERTS WILL BE DEPOSED PRIOR TO THE TRIAL DATE. TRIAL WILL NOT BE DELAYED FOR THE PURPOSE OF DEPOSING EXPERTS. THE COURT ORDERED THE CASE CONSOLIDATED WITH 447748 POUNDS V CHESTERTON FOR TRIAL PURPOSES ONLY. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ROBERT DONDERO; CLERK: JHULIE ROQUE/LESPY; REPORTER: SARA LERSCHEN CSR #6213 (206)

REMOVED FROM ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON FEB-14-2007. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 206 ON SEP-11-2006 AT 11:15 AM FOR TRIAL. ASSIGNED FOR MANDATORY SETTLEMENT IN DEPT. 304 ON SEP-01-2006 AT 9:30 AM. ALL EXPEDITED SUMMARY JUDGMENT MOTIONS WILL BE HEARD AT THAT TIME IN DEPT. 608. (206)
